model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + treat_post + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + sex + educ', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: citizen in [3, 4] (non-citizen, proxy for undocumented status)
year in [2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA; 2012 excluded as transition year)
birthyr >= 1975 and birthyr <= 1996 (relevant birth cohorts for DiD)
yrimmig < birthyr + 16 (arrived in US before 16th birthday, DACA requirement)
